tryhackme.title: Attacktive Directory
tryhackme.description: Exploited a vulnerable Domain Controller to steal credentials, capture a DC hash, and document mitigation options.

tryhackme.title: L2 MAC Flooding & ARP Spoofing
tryhackme.description: Delved into layer-2 attacks, sniffing unicast traffic and convincing victim hosts via ARP poisoning while highlighting VLAN and switch hardening.

tryhackme.title: Intro to Log Analysis
tryhackme.description: Mapped common log sources, applied detection rules, and shared visualization tips for SOC workflows.

tryhackme.title: Threat Intelligence Tools
tryhackme.description: Surveyed OSINT wheels, built context-rich profiles, and connected indicators back to SOC reporting standards.

hackthebox.title: Lame
hackthebox.description: Enumerated legacy SMB shares, abused weak permissions, and followed a multistage privilege escalation path.

picoctf.title: Encryption - Crypto 101
picoctf.description: Explored classical ciphers while mapping the math behind mix-and-mangle encryption engines.
